name: Fibery MCP
description: This MCP (Model Context Protocol) server provides integration between Fibery and any LLM provider supporting the MCP protocol (e.g., Claude for Desktop), allowing you to interact with your Fibery workspace using natural language.

tools.name: describe_database
tools.description: Get list of all fields (in format of 'Title [name]: type') in the selected Fibery database and for all related databases.

database_name.description: Database name as defined in Fibery schema

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Offers powerful, flexible access to your Fibery data through the Fibery API.

tools.name: create_entity
tools.description: Creates new entities in your Fibery workspace with specified field values.

tools.name: create_entities_batch
tools.description: Creates multiple new entities in your Fibery workspace with specified field values.

tools.name: update_entity
tools.description: Updates existing entities in your Fibery workspace with new field values.
